name: getAnimatedPicture
description: Animate or transform an existing image into a short video using Replicate (Google Veo 3). Always execute a fresh generation — never reuse video URLs from previous calls. Typically chained after getImage or getImageSD: pass the returned image URL as imageURL. Use this for animation requests on existing images. To generate a video from text only (no source image), use getVideoFromText instead.

prompt.description: Describe how the given image should be animated or transformed.

videoPollIntervalMs.description: Override poll interval in ms (defaults to toolsconfig.getAnimatedPicture.videoPollIntervalMs).

videoPublicBaseUrl.description: Override public base URL for saved files (defaults to toolsconfig.getAnimatedPicture.videoPublicBaseUrl).
